forecast-period.text: Morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the north. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of frost near the eastern border early this morning. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of frost in the early morning. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning frost in the west. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the southwest. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Patchy morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloud clearing. Patchy morning fog south of Hawker. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the early morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Areas of morning frost south of Hawker. The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Patchy morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog near the east coast. The chance of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Patchy morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Woomera in the morning. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Yunta in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
